zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford於1220年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford13歲，母親Countess Hawise de Quincy36歲。他於1252年2月22日與Alice Sanford在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1263年在英國被列為lord great chamberlain。他去世於1296年在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford于1220年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford13岁，母亲Countess Hawise de Quincy36岁。他于1252年2月22日与Alice Sanford在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1263年在英国被列为lord great chamberlain。他去世于1296年在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford was born in 1220, in Essex, England, his father, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, was 13 and his mother, Countess Hawise de Quincy, was 36. He married Alice Sanford on 22 February 1252, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. In 1263, his occupation is listed as lord great chamberlain in England. He died in 1296, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Lewes St Anne, Lewes, Sussex, England: Lewes St Anne, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford est né en 1220, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Countess Hawise de Quincy, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Sanford le 22 février 1252, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. En 1263, sa profession de son indiquée est lord great chamberlain à Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1296, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford 1220 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford 13 und seine Mutter Countess Hawise de Quincy 36. Er hat am 22. Februar 1252 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Sanford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1263 ist sein Beruf als lord great chamberlain in England aufgeführt. Er starb 1296 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford è nato il nel 1220 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Countess Hawise de Quincy, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Alice Sanford il 22 febbraio 1252, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1263, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord great chamberlain nel England. Morì nel 1296, nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxfordが1220年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxfordは13歳，母Countess Hawise de Quincyは36歳であった。1252年2月22日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでAlice Sanfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1263年，イギリスでの職業はlord great chamberlainと記録されている。彼は1296年にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.Lewes St Anne, Lewes, Sussex, England: 영국 수세스 루스 루스 스트 앤
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford(이)가 1220년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Hawise de Quincy(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1252년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Alice Sanford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1263년, 그의 직업은 영국에서 lord great chamberlain이었다. 그는 1296년 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.Hedingham Castle,Essex,England: Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford nasceu em 1220, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Countess Hawise de Quincy, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Sanford em 22 de fevereiro de 1252, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1263, sua profissão aparece como lord great chamberlain em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1296, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Lewes St Anne, Lewes, Sussex, England: львесь ст анн, львесь, суссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford родился в 1220 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Hawise de Quincy, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Sanford 22 февраля 1252 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1263 году он работал по профессии lord great chamberlain в местности Англия. Он умер в 1296 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford nació en 1220, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Countess Hawise de Quincy, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Alice Sanford el 22 de febrero de 1252, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1263, su ocupación registrada era lord great chamberlain en Inglaterra. Murió en 1296, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
